info.title: Microsoft Power BI REST API
info.description: The Power BI REST APIs provide service endpoints for embedding, administration, governance and user resources. Manage Power BI content, perform admin operations, and embed Power BI content. Requires Azure AD application registration for authentication.

get.summary: Returns a list of datasets from My workspace
Returns the specified dataset from My workspace

delete.summary: Deletes the specified dataset from My workspace

patch.summary: Updates the properties for the specified dataset from My workspace

post.summary: Triggers a refresh for the specified dataset from My workspace

get.summary: Returns the refresh history for the specified dataset from My workspace

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The requested number of entries in the refresh history

delete.summary: Cancels the specified refresh operation for the specified dataset

get.summary: Returns a list of data sources for the specified dataset from My workspace

post.summary: Updates the data sources of the specified dataset from My workspace

get.summary: Returns a list of parameters for the specified dataset from My workspace

post.summary: Updates the parameters values for the specified dataset from My workspace

get.summary: Returns a list of principals that have access to the specified dataset

post.summary: Grants the specified user's permissions to the specified dataset

put.summary: Updates the existing dataset permissions of the specified user

post.summary: Executes DAX queries against the provided dataset
Binds the specified dataset from My workspace to the specified gateway

get.summary: Returns a list of gateways that the specified dataset can be bound to
Returns the refresh schedule for the specified dataset from My workspace

patch.summary: Updates the refresh schedule for the specified dataset from My workspace

get.summary: Returns the refresh schedule for a DirectQuery or LiveConnection dataset

patch.summary: Updates the refresh schedule for a DirectQuery or LiveConnection dataset

get.summary: Returns the query scale-out sync status for the specified dataset

post.summary: Triggers a query scale-out sync of read-only replicas for the specified dataset

get.summary: Returns a list of reports from My workspace
Returns the specified report from My workspace

delete.summary: Deletes the specified report from My workspace

post.summary: Clones the specified report from My workspace

get.summary: Exports the specified report from My workspace to a .pbix or .rdl file

post.summary: Exports the specified report to the requested file format

format.description: The requested file format (PDF, PNG, PPTX)

get.summary: Returns the current status of the Export to File job
Returns the file from the Export to File job
Returns a list of pages within the specified report from My workspace
Returns the specified page within the specified report from My workspace

post.summary: Rebinds the specified report to the specified dataset
Updates the content of the specified report with content from a source report

get.summary: Returns a list of dashboards from My workspace

post.summary: Creates a new empty dashboard in My workspace

get.summary: Returns the specified dashboard from My workspace

delete.summary: Deletes the specified dashboard from My workspace

get.summary: Returns a list of tiles within the specified dashboard from My workspace
Returns the specified tile within the specified dashboard from My workspace

post.summary: Clones the specified tile from My workspace

get.summary: Returns a list of workspaces the user has access to

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Returns only the first n results

post.summary: Creates a new workspace

parameters.name: workspaceV2
parameters.description: Whether to create a v2 workspace

get.summary: Returns a specified workspace
Returns a list of users that have access to the specified workspace

post.summary: Grants the specified user the specified permissions to the workspace

put.summary: Updates the specified user permissions to the workspace

delete.summary: Deletes the specified user permissions from the workspace

get.summary: Returns a list of datasets from the specified workspace
Returns a list of reports from the specified workspace
Returns a list of dashboards from the specified workspace
Returns a list of installed apps
Returns the specified installed app
Returns a list of reports from the specified app
Returns the specified report from the specified app
Returns a list of dashboards from the specified app
Returns the specified dashboard from the specified app
Returns a list of tiles within the specified dashboard from the specified app
Returns the specified tile from the specified dashboard and app
Returns a list of imports from My workspace

post.summary: Creates new content in My workspace

parameters.name: datasetDisplayName
parameters.description: The display name of the dataset

parameters.name: nameConflict
parameters.description: Determines what to do if a dataset with the same name already exists

get.summary: Returns the specified import from My workspace

post.summary: Creates a temporary blob storage upload location for importing large .pbix files

get.summary: Returns a list of gateways for which the user is an admin
Returns the specified gateway
Returns a list of data sources from the specified gateway

post.summary: Creates a new data source on the specified on-premises gateway

get.summary: Returns the specified data source from the specified gateway

delete.summary: Deletes the specified data source from the specified gateway

patch.summary: Updates the credentials of the specified data source from the specified gateway

get.summary: Checks the connectivity status of the specified data source from the specified gateway
Returns a list of users who have access to the specified data source

post.summary: Grants or updates the permissions for the specified data source user

delete.summary: Removes the specified user from the specified data source

post.summary: Generates an embed token for multiple reports, datasets, and target workspaces
Generates an embed token to view or edit the specified report from the specified workspace
Generates an embed token to view the specified dashboard from the specified workspace
Generates an embed token based on the specified dataset from the specified workspace

get.summary: Returns a list of tables within the specified push dataset from My workspace

put.summary: Updates the metadata and schema for the specified table within the push dataset

post.summary: Adds new data rows to the specified table within the push dataset

delete.summary: Deletes all rows from the specified table within the push dataset

get.summary: Returns a list of available features

OAuth2.description: Azure Active Directory OAuth2 authentication. Register an Azure AD application to use with Power BI.
